title: Godetia whitneyi
taxonomy: Godetia whitneyi is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It is a type of annual or short-lived perennial that is native to California. The plant is classified within the genus Godetia, which includes several species of flowering plants. The plant's classification is further refined within the family Polemoniaceae, which includes other flowering plants commonly found in the western United States.
